commitMessage:
Migrates container create, run-lifecycle, exec, remove, copy. (#1844)

- Part of #1833.

body.content: Test.current!.name.trimmingCharacters(in: ["(", ")"]).lowercased()

let (_, _, _, status) = try run(arguments: [
            "copy",
            "/tmp/source.txt",
            "/tmp/dest.txt",
        ])
        #expect(status != 0, "expected local-to-local copy to fail")
